sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n87894" key="pro/kuyis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πρόκυψις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n87894.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">peeping out: emergence,</tr_> of the new-born infant, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0530.tlg006:16:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Porph.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Gaur.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">16.6</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
